MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RUSSELL LAU'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - To be heard at the same time and date in Department 501. Judge: James Mcbride; Court Reporter: Teanna L. Ward, CSR No. 119118 = (302/JJM)

Notice Of Demurrer By Defendant Russell Lau
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Semel (510-763-2324) of Haapala Thompson & Abern for Russell Lau, defendant and moving party / Michael S. Smith (415-318-5709) of Hooshmand Law Group for Karen Saylor, plaintiff and opposing party

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument vacates its tentative ruling and takes Defendant Russell Lau's Demurrer under submission. Defendant submits a proposed order. Plaintiff to submit a proposed order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
